title: Mortgage Interest Arrears

statuteRef.label: Time limit for arrears of interest under mortgage

questions.label: Date interest arrears became due
questions.helpText: Use the relevant due date for the arrears being claimed.

questions.label: Are there multiple arrears periods or rolling arrears?
questions.helpText: Interest arrears often accrue in multiple periods. If yes, separate period analysis may be needed.

notes: Interest arrears commonly require period-by-period analysis.
This option gives a directional calculation and flags scenarios that usually need manual legal breakdown.
